title: cotoneaster calocarpus
intro: Cotoneaster calocarpus, also known as the rock cotoneaster, is a type of flowering shrub native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and berries of Cotoneaster calocarpus are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
